title: Constraint-aware temporal post-processing
summary: Race strategy is sequential and pit stops reset tyre state; public simulators and modelling references represent stints as timelines with resets.
rationale: Race strategy is sequential and pit stops reset tyre state; public simulators and modelling references represent stints as timelines with resets. Current submissions appear to use raw row-wise probabilities without enforcing temporal consistency within each driver race.
implementation_hint: After model prediction, sort test by Race, Driver, LapNumber. Apply lightweight rules tested on OOF predictions: suppress probability on the row immediately after a current PitStop, smooth isolated spikes with neighboring same-stint probabilities, boost local maxima inside learned pit windows, and optionally keep only the top one or two probability peaks per Race-Driver-Stint depending on historical stop count priors.
expected_effect: May improve AUC by removing impossible or implausible isolated high scores and concentrating rank mass on true stop windows.
risk: Over-aggressive clipping can hurt AUC if the target includes unusual events such as safety-car double stops or wet-weather chaos. Tune only on OOF race-group validation.
